div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Winant)
div.p: 6053. Your 6149, December 19, noon.Not printed; it reported the first meeting of the Inter-Allied Committee on Post-War Requirements and asked instructions as to American participation on the agricultural subcommittee. MurrayAlton T. Murray, Assistant Agricultural Attaché in the United Kingdom. may attend meetings of agricultural subcommittee until SteereLoyd V. Steere, Agricultural Attaché in the United Kingdom. returns. Steyne may participate actively as a member of the committee. In so advising Leith-Ross you should indicate this Government’s understanding that any plans elaborated by committee are merely advisory until they have been fully considered by the respective governments.
